description: DarkFactory managed repository lifecycle registry. Only active repositories are eligible for plan, orchestrate, and follow-through sweeps.

marius-patrik/dream.note: Dogfood target from the DarkFactory PRD.

marius-patrik/agents-plugin.note: Dogfood target from the DarkFactory PRD.

marius-patrik/agents-manager.note: Renamed from agents-mono; contains the folded packages/ directory (agents-core, agents-harness, agents-manager, llm-gateway, inference-engine).

marius-patrik/agents-manager-legacy.note: Original agents-manager repo; content folded into agents-manager packages/agents-manager and repo renamed/archived.

marius-patrik/agents-harness.note: Folded into agents-manager packages/agents-harness via Phase B restructure.

marius-patrik/agents-core.note: Folded into agents-manager packages/agents-core via Phase B restructure.

marius-patrik/llm-gateway.note: Folded into agents-manager packages/llm-gateway via Phase B restructure.

marius-patrik/inference-engine.note: Folded into agents-manager packages/inference-engine via Phase B restructure.

marius-patrik/darkfactory-templates.note: Folded into agent-darkfactory/templates/ via Phase D restructure.

marius-patrik/template-bot.note: Folded into agent-darkfactory/templates/templates/template-bot via Phase D restructure.

marius-patrik/template-cli.note: Folded into agent-darkfactory/templates/templates/template-cli via Phase D restructure.

marius-patrik/template-repo.note: Folded into agent-darkfactory/templates/templates/template-repo via Phase D restructure.

marius-patrik/template-web.note: Folded into agent-darkfactory/templates/templates/template-web via Phase D restructure.
